export default "# Quality Assurance Surveillance Plan (QASP) Template\n\n## Overview\nThis QASP defines how the government will monitor contractor performance to ensure objectives are met.\n\n## Performance Standards\n\n### Standard 1: Working Software Delivery\n- **Objective**: Deliver tested, working software each sprint\n- **Performance Threshold**: 95% of committed user stories completed and deployed\n- **Method**: Sprint review demonstrations\n- **Frequency**: Every [2 weeks / sprint duration]\n\n### Standard 2: Code Quality\n- **Objective**: Maintain high code quality and test coverage\n- **Performance Threshold**: \n  - 80% automated test coverage\n  - No critical security vulnerabilities\n- **Method**: Automated testing reports, security scans\n- **Frequency**: Continuous (reviewed at sprint reviews)\n\n### Standard 3: User Satisfaction\n- **Objective**: Meet user needs and expectations\n- **Performance Threshold**: Average user satisfaction score of 4/5 or higher\n- **Method**: User feedback surveys, usability testing\n- **Frequency**: Quarterly\n\n### Standard 4: Collaboration and Communication\n- **Objective**: Effective collaboration with government team\n- **Performance Threshold**: \n  - Daily standups conducted\n  - Sprint planning/retrospectives held\n  - Responsive to government feedback\n- **Method**: COR observation and feedback\n- **Frequency**: Ongoing\n\n## Monitoring Approach\n- **COR Responsibilities**: Attend sprint reviews, monitor deliverables, provide feedback\n- **Contractor Responsibilities**: Provide access to systems, reports, and demos\n- **Incentives/Disincentives**: [If applicable]\n\n## Remediation Process\n1. **Minor Issues**: Addressed in sprint retrospective\n2. **Moderate Issues**: Corrective action plan within 5 business days\n3. **Major Issues**: Escalation to Contracting Officer\n\n## Acceptable Quality Level (AQL)\n- Overall performance must meet or exceed 90% of all standards\n- No critical security vulnerabilities left unaddressed\n"
